At ~$414 (market quote 2026-07-15), the Lawrence owner-cash model produces −8.2% per year on $7.02/sh starting owner cash after fixed-asset spending and share-based compensation (bear −12.6%, bull −2.9%). Proof-first additive components sum to ~$246 per share at base case versus ~$414 price. TPL is a dual-segment Permi
The operating base produces **−8.2%** per year over 7 years at **~$414** on **$7.02/sh** starting owner cash.

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: Permian activity and completion intensity decline, slowing royalty and water volumes while the stock embeds premium growth.
Commodity price collapse reduces operator economics on TPL acreage.
Produced-water regulation or litigation raises operator costs or restricts TPWR volumes.
